title: Japanese Fig Dumplings
description: A unique dessert combining Japanese and Ukrainian flavors, featuring sweet figs and rich cream.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together fig jam and heavy cream until well combined.
3. Add granulated sugar, egg, and vanilla extract to the bowl. Mix until smooth.
4. Lay dumpling wrappers on a flat surface. Spoon a small amount of the fig mixture onto the center of each wrapper.
5. Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
6. Place the dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the dumplings are golden brown.
8. Serve warm with additional fig jam if desired.
